message.hydrophobicelytra.too_wet: Your Elytra is too wet to fly!
text.autoconfig.hydrophobic-elytra.title: Hydrophobic Elytra Configuration
text.autoconfig.hydrophobic-elytra.optio: If disabled, the mod essentially turns off and you can fly underwater.
Select which fluids will cancel Elytra flight.
Shows a chat message when trying to fly in fluids.
Plays a fire extinguish sound when trying to fly in fluids.
